text.title: Sentry Alert Routing for Solos Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the Sentry Alert Routing for Solos methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Filters live in Sentry/Plausible UI BEFORE the digest stage. Pulling everything and filtering in code wastes API quota.
rule.rationale: Filters live in Sentry/Plausible UI BEFORE the digest stage. Pulling everything and filtering in code wastes API quota.

rule.statement: Low-priority events are batched into hourly + daily digests. Per-event pages are reserved for severity ≥ high.
rule.rationale: Low-priority events are batched into hourly + daily digests. Per-event pages are reserved for severity ≥ high.

rule.statement: Quiet hours (default 22:00-08:00 operator-local) BLOCK all paging UNLESS event matches the escalation matrix (≥100 events/min OR uptime down ≥10min).
rule.rationale: Quiet hours (default 22:00-08:00 operator-local) BLOCK all paging UNLESS event matches the escalation matrix (≥100 events/min OR uptime down ≥10min).

rule.statement: Exactly ONE channel receives pages. Multi-channel paging trains the operator to ignore all of them.
rule.rationale: Exactly ONE channel receives pages. Multi-channel paging trains the operator to ignore all of them.

rule.statement: Config names the single operator. 'team' / 'we' / '' forbidden.
rule.rationale: Config names the single operator. 'team' / 'we' / '' forbidden.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-sentry-alert-routing-for-solos.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
